profiles.name: 01 Zoom Controls
profiles.description: Foot-controlled Zoom meeting controls. Button A toggles your microphone (Cmd+Shift+A on macOS, Alt+A on Windows). Button B toggles your camera (Cmd+Shift+V on macOS, Alt+V on Windows). This profile targets macOS — see the 'Windows' profile for the Windows variant. Zoom must be the focused window.

profiles.name: 02 Zoom Controls (Windows)
profiles.description: Same as profile 01 but for Windows. Alt+A mutes/unmutes, Alt+V toggles video.
